artPrompt: A jittery ashen-robed human acolyte clutches a guttering candle to their chest, shoulders hunched, eyes darting sideways with fresh existential dread, half-lit by cold gold flame in the midnight revival crowd. A clock tower looms blurred behind. The gesture is all anxious uncertainty. Wide landscape framing, bone white and gold washes bleeding into smoky black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Nervous Precinct Convert
text:
When Nervous Precinct Convert dies, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and each other player you converted nods grimly.
Whenever you remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock, Nervous Precinct Convert gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Hope is, briefly, a stat boost.
flavorText: Joined the caucus for the free snacks. Stayed for the existential dread.
